unit_classification_authority.official_framework: AP Statistics Course and Exam Description, Effective Fall 2026
unit_classification_authority.policy: Official exam and subject framework materials are the only authority for unit classification.
unit_classification_authority.student_progression_rule: A question belongs to the earliest official Fall 2026 unit after which a student can answer it using that unit and prior units only.

framework_note: Effective Fall 2026 AP Statistics uses five official units; legacy nine-unit labels were migrated by required statistical knowledge.
